reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y servicio el lugar cuenta con sanitarios y un lugar acogedor para poder tomar un café y realizar algunas compras pata luego continuar camino a casa

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention. The place has restrooms and a cozy area to have a coffee and do some shopping before continuing on your way home.

reviews.comment:
La de mano a acceso oeste cierra a hora que quiere, te cobran con débito cuando se les da la gana y generalmente te cobran en efectivo. Me rayaron el auto con la tuerca de la manguera proxima al pico del surtidor y eso que estaba al lado y le dije que no apoye la manguera contra el auto. No tiene ninguna protección para que no raye. Ahora a quien le reclamo? Ahí son un desastre, cargue porque no me quedaba alternativa.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station on the west access road closes whenever it feels like it, they only accept debit card payments when they want, and they usually only accept cash. They scratched my car with the nut on the hose near the pump nozzle, even though I was standing right next to it and told them not to put the hose against the car. There's no protection against scratches. Now who do I complain to? They're a disaster there; I filled up because I had no other choice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxby1yRlFBEAE
